case_title: SCHROEDER'S RESTAURANT C/O MALOUF, PHILIP VS MCMURRAY, CHRISTIAN V.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $861.00 FILED BY SCHROEDER'S RESTAURANT C/O MALOUF, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT MCMURRAY, CHRISTIAN V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
